name: Zupa Kartoflana - Polish Potato Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the vegetables in a pot and cover with water. Add seasoning and cook until well done.
2. Strain the cooked vegetables through a sieve.
3. In a separate pan, heat butter until light brown.
4. Stir in flour and let it cook until the mixture bubbles and is well blended.
5. Gradually add hot milk to the flour mixture while stirring. Continue cooking just below the boiling point until the mixture is smooth and thick.
6. Add the strained vegetables back into the pot and stir until smooth and thickened.
7. Sprinkle with chopped parsley and serve with egg barley.
